name: tailbone-corepos

metadata.name: tailbone-corepos
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 or later (GPLv3+)
Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules

documentation:
# tailbone-corepos

Rattail is a retail software framework, released under the GNU General
Public License.

This package contains software interfaces for the [CORE
POS](https://www.core-pos.com/) system, which is open source and
freely available.

Please see Rattail's [home page](https://rattailproject.org/) for more
information.

classes.name: tailbone_corepos.views.products.ProductViewSupplement

methods.name: tailbone_corepos.views.products.ProductViewSupplement.get_version_child_classes
documentation: def objectify(self, form, data=None):
if data is None:
data = form.validated
product = super(ProductView, self).objectify(form, data)
return self.corepos_objectify(product)
def corepos_objectify(self, product):
# remove the corepos extension record outright, if we just lost the ID
if product._corepos and not product.corepos_id:
self.Session.delete(product._corepos)
self.Session.flush()
return product
Product view supplement for CORE integration

methods.name: tailbone_corepos.views.corepos.master.CoreMasterView.template_kwargs_view
documentation:
Adds the URL for viewing the record/object within CORE Office, or else
the reason for lack of such a URL.

methods.name: tailbone_corepos.views.corepos.master.CoreMasterView.core_office_object_url
documentation:
Subclass must define this logic; should return the "final" CORE Office
URL for the given object.
Master base class for all CORE-POS views

modules.name: tailbone_corepos.db
documentation:
Web Database Sessions

As with `tailbone.db.Session`, the idea here is that we want to tie our
database sessions to the effective web "transaction" so that they are
auto-committed and -closed when the request has finished processing.
